channel.title: Video tutorials on how to migrate a WordPress site to React using Frontity (in Spanish)
channel.description:
[Fran Gallardo](https://twitter.com/fran__gallardo) is working on a new, great series of videos in Spanish to show how to migrate a real WordPress site ([Product Designer](https://productdesigner.es/)) to React using Frontity. All the links are below. You can also **find them all in** [**this Youtube playlist**](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLj8OTTEJGbda-7GOemB-h39Nkikpsn4NB).
If you're new to Frontity, take a look first at the [previous course that Fran created](https://productdesigner.es/curso/como-crear-una-web-app-con-wordpress-y-react-usando-frontity/), it will allow you to have a good knowledge base to follow this series.
**01- Introduction and first steps**
https://youtu.be/gC-j1ybdgn0
**02 - Setting up the project**
https://youtu.be/RbPrIqf0zJI
**03 - Creating the theme and the first components**
https://youtu.be/L0reIkhPdw8
**04 - Creating a search engine with state and actions**
https://youtu.be/D-PAclp3KgM
**05 - Working with custom taxonomies**
https://youtu.be/LBzxhz_F2mQ
**06 - Styling your app**
https://youtu.be/RjSYDllpsd4
**07 - Adding a dark mode to the theme**
https://youtu.be/5CORXpDMd2A
**08 - Creating the Homepage of the Frontity app**
https://youtu.be/FfahQuj2KxQ
**09 - Creating a responsive menu on mobile**
https://youtu.be/LlbcxPoRkA0
Thanks for creating these useful resources, Fran! :clap:

item.title: Video tutorials on how to migrate a WordPress site to React using Frontity (in Spanish)
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Fran Gallardo is working on a new, great series of videos in Spanish to show how to migrate a real WordPress site (Product Designer) to React using Frontity. All the links are below. You can also find them all in this Youtube playlist.

If you’re new to Frontity, take a look first at the previous course that Fran created, it will allow you to have a good knowledge base to follow this series.

01- Introduction and first steps

De WordPress a React usando Frontity 01: Introducción y primeros pasos

02 - Setting up the project

De WordPress a React usando Frontity 02: Creando el proyecto. Navegación y state

03 - Creating the theme and the first components

De WordPress a React usando Frontity 03: Creando el theme y los primeros componentes

04 - Creating a search engine with state and actions

De WordPress a React usando Frontity 04: Creando el buscador con state y actions

05 - Working with custom taxonomies

De WordPress a React usando Frontity 05: Trabajando con custom taxonomies

06 - Styling your app

De WordPress a React usando Frontity 06: Añadiendo estilos y CSS

07 - Adding a dark mode to the theme

De WordPress a React usando Frontity 07: Creando un modo oscuro para nuestro theme

08 - Creating the Homepage of the Frontity app

De WordPress a React usando Frontity 08: Comenzando con la Home de la app.

09 - Creating a responsive menu on mobile

De WordPress a React usando Frontity 09: Creando un menú responsive para móvil

Thanks for creating these useful resources, Fran!

Read full topic
item.source: Video tutorials on how to migrate a WordPress site to React using Frontity (in Spanish)
